details.name: cd /Users/landonking/openclaw-army

content.text: The `.venv` is getting staged accidentally. Let me be more selective — only stage the meaningful changes, not the entire venv.

arguments.command:
cd /Users/landonking/openclaw-army && git add \
  agents/epsilon-manager \
  agents/eta-manager \
  data/cron_tasks.json \
  data/logs/activity.jsonl \
  data/logs/failures.jsonl \
  "data/obsidian database/decisions/ADR-009-deploy-script-resilience.md" \
  extensions/permission-broker/state/audit.jsonl \
  tsconfig.json \
  2>&1
